testcase.name: test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available[bf16]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 5 / 16 (31.2%) Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 1) Greatest relative difference: 6.985462874808945e-08 at index (4, 0)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.bfloat16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4
def test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, ): inputs = _make_inputs( kv_dtype=kv_dtype, head_dim=head_dim, num_kv_heads=num_kv_heads, num_blocks=2, block_size=16, q_len=2, num_q_heads=num_kv_heads * 2, seed=3, )
# Default path O_default, LSE_default = forward_partial_with_lse(**inputs) # Force portable O_force, LSE_force = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) torch.testing.assert_close(O_default, O_force, atol=0, rtol=0) > torch.testing.assert_close(LSE_default, LSE_force, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 5 / 16 (31.2%) E Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 1) E Greatest relative difference: 6.985462874808945e-08 at index (4, 0)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_portable_cross_check.py:308: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available[fp16]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 5 / 2048 (0.2%) Greatest absolute difference: 1.52587890625e-05 at index (0, 2, 27) Greatest relative difference: 0.0009641647338867188 at index (0, 7, 25)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.float16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4
def test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, ): inputs = _make_inputs( kv_dtype=kv_dtype, head_dim=head_dim, num_kv_heads=num_kv_heads, num_blocks=2, block_size=16, q_len=2, num_q_heads=num_kv_heads * 2, seed=3, )
# Default path O_default, LSE_default = forward_partial_with_lse(**inputs) # Force portable O_force, LSE_force = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) > torch.testing.assert_close(O_default, O_force, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 5 / 2048 (0.2%) E Greatest absolute difference: 1.52587890625e-05 at index (0, 2, 27) E Greatest relative difference: 0.0009641647338867188 at index (0, 7, 25)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_portable_cross_check.py:307: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable[bf16-avx512]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 1 / 3072 (0.0%) Greatest absolute difference: 3.814697265625e-06 at index (0, 2, 109) Greatest relative difference: 0.004730224609375 at index (0, 2, 109)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.bfloat16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4 forced_path = <ISAPath.AVX512: 'avx512'>
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "forced_path", [ISAPath.PORTABLE, ISAPath.AVX512, ISAPath.AMX] ) def test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, forced_path ): """On this dev machine the AMX / AVX-512 C++ bindings are not wired (TSK_001 §4.2a/b — Phase 2). The wrapper must cascade those forced paths to the portable kernel instead. All three forced paths therefore produce the same result as forcing portable directly.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) O_forced, LSE_forced = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=forced_path, ) > torch.testing.assert_close(O_forced, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 1 / 3072 (0.0%) E Greatest absolute difference: 3.814697265625e-06 at index (0, 2, 109) E Greatest relative difference: 0.004730224609375 at index (0, 2, 109)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:115: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable[bf16-amx]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 3 / 24 (12.5%) Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (1, 0) Greatest relative difference: 6.870989466278843e-08 at index (5, 0)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.bfloat16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4 forced_path = <ISAPath.AMX: 'amx'>
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "forced_path", [ISAPath.PORTABLE, ISAPath.AVX512, ISAPath.AMX] ) def test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, forced_path ): """On this dev machine the AMX / AVX-512 C++ bindings are not wired (TSK_001 §4.2a/b — Phase 2). The wrapper must cascade those forced paths to the portable kernel instead. All three forced paths therefore produce the same result as forcing portable directly.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) O_forced, LSE_forced = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=forced_path, ) torch.testing.assert_close(O_forced, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) > torch.testing.assert_close(LSE_forced, LSE_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 3 / 24 (12.5%) E Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (1, 0) E Greatest relative difference: 6.870989466278843e-08 at index (5, 0)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:116: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable[fp16-avx512]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 4 / 3072 (0.1%) Greatest absolute difference: 3.0517578125e-05 at index (1, 6, 124) Greatest relative difference: 0.00704193115234375 at index (1, 4, 115)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.float16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4 forced_path = <ISAPath.AVX512: 'avx512'>
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "forced_path", [ISAPath.PORTABLE, ISAPath.AVX512, ISAPath.AMX] ) def test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, forced_path ): """On this dev machine the AMX / AVX-512 C++ bindings are not wired (TSK_001 §4.2a/b — Phase 2). The wrapper must cascade those forced paths to the portable kernel instead. All three forced paths therefore produce the same result as forcing portable directly.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) O_forced, LSE_forced = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=forced_path, ) > torch.testing.assert_close(O_forced, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 4 / 3072 (0.1%) E Greatest absolute difference: 3.0517578125e-05 at index (1, 6, 124) E Greatest relative difference: 0.00704193115234375 at index (1, 4, 115)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:115: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable[fp16-amx]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 3 / 3072 (0.1%) Greatest absolute difference: 3.0517578125e-05 at index (1, 2, 62) Greatest relative difference: 0.0008792877197265625 at index (0, 2, 58)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.float16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4 forced_path = <ISAPath.AMX: 'amx'>
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "forced_path", [ISAPath.PORTABLE, ISAPath.AVX512, ISAPath.AMX] ) def test_force_simd_path_cascades_to_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads, forced_path ): """On this dev machine the AMX / AVX-512 C++ bindings are not wired (TSK_001 §4.2a/b — Phase 2). The wrapper must cascade those forced paths to the portable kernel instead. All three forced paths therefore produce the same result as forcing portable directly.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) O_forced, LSE_forced = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=forced_path, ) > torch.testing.assert_close(O_forced, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 3 / 3072 (0.1%) E Greatest absolute difference: 3.0517578125e-05 at index (1, 2, 62) E Greatest relative difference: 0.0008792877197265625 at index (0, 2, 58)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:115: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_default_path_matches_forced_portable[bf16]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 2 / 24 (8.3%) Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 0) Greatest relative difference: 6.968386401240423e-08 at index (0, 0)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.bfloat16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4
def test_default_path_matches_forced_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads ): """Default dispatch on this dev machine should resolve to portable (no AMX hardware, AVX-512 kernel not wired) → identical to ``_force_path=PORTABLE``.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_default, LSE_default = forward_partial_with_lse(**inputs) O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) torch.testing.assert_close(O_default, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) > torch.testing.assert_close(LSE_default, LSE_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 2 / 24 (8.3%) E Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 0) E Greatest relative difference: 6.968386401240423e-08 at index (0, 0)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:132: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_default_path_matches_forced_portable[fp16]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 5 / 3072 (0.2%) Greatest absolute difference: 3.814697265625e-06 at index (1, 4, 9) Greatest relative difference: 0.0011110305786132812 at index (1, 4, 29)

testcase.failure:
kv_dtype = torch.float16, head_dim = 128, num_kv_heads = 4
def test_default_path_matches_forced_portable( kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads ): """Default dispatch on this dev machine should resolve to portable (no AMX hardware, AVX-512 kernel not wired) → identical to ``_force_path=PORTABLE``.""" inputs = _make_minimal_inputs(kv_dtype, head_dim, num_kv_heads)
O_default, LSE_default = forward_partial_with_lse(**inputs) O_portable, LSE_portable = forward_partial_with_lse( **inputs, _force_path=ISAPath.PORTABLE, ) > torch.testing.assert_close(O_default, O_portable, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 5 / 3072 (0.2%) E Greatest absolute difference: 3.814697265625e-06 at index (1, 4, 9) E Greatest relative difference: 0.0011110305786132812 at index (1, 4, 29)
tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_wrapper_dispatch.py:131: AssertionError
